zh.lifeSummary: 當JOHN DE BARTON I於大約1340年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾桑頓時，他的父親GILBERT DE BARTON71歲，母親Agnes De Notton32歲。他於1363年之前與Emmote de Thornborough在英國巴金哈姆爾恩波洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在英國巴金哈姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当JOHN DE BARTON I于大约1340年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾桑頓时，他的父亲GILBERT DE BARTON71岁，母亲Agnes De Notton32岁。他于1363年之前与Emmote de Thornborough在英国巴金哈姆爾恩波洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在英国巴金哈姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BARTON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English bere or bær ‘barley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’, i.e. an outlying grange. Compare Barwick . The name is also found in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as de Bartún.

Polish (Bartoń); Czech and Slovak (mainly Bartoň): from a pet form of the personal name Polish Bartłomiej, Czech Bartoloměj, Slovak Bartolomej, from Latin Bartholomaeus (see Bartholomew ). This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Barwick
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Berwick or Barwick, for example in Northumberland, Norfolk, Somerset, and Yorkshire, from Old English bere ‘barley’ + wīc ‘outlying farm building’, i.e. a granary lying some distance away from the main settlement.
North German: habitational name from a place called Berwick, near Soest, in Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: JOHN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When JOHN DE BARTON I was born about 1340, in Thornton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, GILBERT DE BARTON, was 71 and his mother, Agnes De Notton, was 32. He married Emmote de Thornborough before 1363, in Thornborough, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque JOHN DE BARTON I est né environ 1340, à Thornton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, GILBERT DE BARTON, avait 71 ans et sa mère, Agnes De Notton, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Emmote de Thornborough avant 1363, à Thornborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als JOHN DE BARTON I um 1340 in Thornton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater GILBERT DE BARTON 71 und seine Mutter Agnes De Notton 32. Er hat vor 1363 in Thornborough, Buckinghamshire, England Emmote de Thornborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb in Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando JOHN DE BARTON I è nato il circa 1340 nel Thornton, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, GILBERT DE BARTON, aveva 71 anni e il suo madre, Agnes De Notton, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Emmote de Thornborough prima del 1363, nel Thornborough, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: JOHN DE BARTON Iが約1340年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアソルントンで生まれた時，父GILBERT DE BARTONは71歳，母Agnes De Nottonは32歳であった。1363年以前にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアソルンボロウでEmmote de Thornboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: JOHN DE BARTON I(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 토른턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 GILBERT DE BARTON(은)는 71세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes De Notton(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1363년 이전 영국 벅잉함실르 토른버루에서 Emmote de Thornborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 벅잉함실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando JOHN DE BARTON I nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Thornton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, GILBERT DE BARTON, tinha 71 anos e sua mãe, Agnes De Notton, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Emmote de Thornborough antes 1363, em Thornborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда JOHN DE BARTON I родился около 1340 г. в местности таурнтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени GILBERT DE BARTON было 71 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes De Notton, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Emmote de Thornborough перед 1363 г. в местности таурнбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в местности буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando JOHN DE BARTON I nació aproximadamente 1340, en Thornton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, GILBERT DE BARTON, tenía 71 años y su mamá, Agnes De Notton, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Emmote de Thornborough antes de 1363, en Thornborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
